title: map_http_status centralizes all HTTP error classification
description: All HTTP status → SecretError mapping goes through one function. 401 correctly maps to Unavailable (not Backend) with an explanatory message about token expiry. 5xx and 429 map to Unavailable (transient). Everything else is Backend (permanent). A contributor adding a new HTTP path through the backend should extend this function, not inline a new match. Keep the centralization.
